dodzie.title: Meet Dodzie
dodzie.summary: A custom AI assistant built into your setup. Connected to your tools. Ready to act.
mobileSummary: AI Assistant built into your setup
points: Connected to your local workspace and files.

projects.kaya: Boutique travel platform showcasing curated desert and cultural tours across Egypt with immersive destination experiences.
projects.powercem: Professional infrastructure landing page highlighting sustainable cement-based soil stabilization solutions for global construction projects.
projects.elleshines: Modern skincare e-commerce store featuring professional beauty tools with seamless UX and conversion-optimized design.
projects.hunters: Urban streetwear e-commerce platform offering premium graphic tees and shorts with a street-culture aesthetic and mobile-optimized shopping.
projects.once: Automated animation creation platform empowering young creators to produce professional-quality animations through an intuitive studio interface.
projects.nasser: Elegant digital art gallery presenting curated fine art collections with a clean, immersive browsing experience.
projects.novello: Premium aesthetic clinic website offering dermatology, laser, and cosmetic services with seamless appointment booking.
